reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para comer en e
Ruta. Buena comida y buena atención con precios razonables. En ruta 2 te afanan con los precios

(Translated by Google)
Good place to eat on Route 2. Good food and good service with reasonable prices. On Route 2 they rip you off with the prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRei1HU25nRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar para parar en la ruta. Tiene todos los servicios que un viajero puede requerir. Con mi familia llevamos a nuestra mascota y pudimos bajar al parque, jugar, cargar nafta y comer algo.  Ideal para parar con chicos, ya que hay juegos de plaza y espacio para patear una pelota. Hay mucha gente en fechas claves, pero el servicio es rápido.

(Translated by Google)
The perfect place to stop along the route. It has all the services a traveler could need. My family and I took our pet and were able to go to the park, play, fill up with gas, and get something to eat. It's ideal for stopping with kids, as there are playground equipment and a space to kick a ball around. It's crowded on busy days, but the service is fast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbnJtMC1nRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Una excelente parada q mitad de camino de la ruta 2. Estación de servicio y un minishop completo. Los precios no son muy amigables, pero en la ruta están todos parecidos. A metros hay una parrilla donde se come bien. Y la ciudad de Dolores está a minutos de ahí.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent stop halfway along Route 2. It's a gas station with a well-stocked convenience store. Prices aren't the most budget-friendly, but they're pretty similar along the route. There's a grill nearby where you can get a good meal. And the city of Dolores is just minutes away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMy1pWC1RRRAB
